case_title: AFFORDABLE SELF STORAGE, INC. VS. STEVE TYSON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AFFORDABLE SELF STORAGE, INC.
